6:141:31.m: the ones who waste or go beyond limits (object of يُحِبُّ - loves)

6:142:3.m: a beast of burden (as the object being described)

6:142:5.m: eat! (command to a group) (from what اللَّهُ has provided you)

6:142:6.m: from what (that Allah has provided you)

6:142:7.m: he provided you all (subject is اللَّهُ)

6:142:15.m: enemy (of the believers, mentioned in context)

6:143:2.m: pairs or mates (possessed by ثَمٰنِيَةَ - eight)

6:143:19.m: inform me! (all of you, with emphasis)

6:143:23.m: people who tell the truth (object of كُنتُمْ)

6:144:2.m: the camels (object of وَمِنَ - and from)

6:144:3.m: two (in the phrase 'and of cattle, two')

6:144:8.m: is it the two males? (object of حَرَّمَ)

6:144:11.m: the two females (object of حَرَّمَ - forbade)

6:144:23.m: with this (referring to the rules about the animals)

هٰذَا: this (referring to the rules about the animals)

6:144:25.m: more unfair (than others mentioned in the ayah)

ظْلَمُ: unfair (than others mentioned in the ayah)

6:144:27.m: he invented falsely (subject of the sentence)

6:144:31.m: so that he leads astray (with emphasis)

6:144:32.m: the people (object of لِّيُضِلَّ - to misguide)

6:145:1.m: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ before لَّآ أَجِدُ)

قُل: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ before لَّآ أَجِدُ)

6:145:8.m: something forbidden (object of أَجِدُ - I find)

6:145:9.m: upon/on (connects طَاعِمٍ to what comes before)

6:145:20.m: meat (object of يَطْعَمُهُ - he eats it)

6:145:25.m: a breaking away (from obedience) (object of أُهِلَّ - was raised)

6:145:29.m: with it/by it (referring to what was dedicated to other than اللَّهِ)

6:145:31.m: he was forced (into eating what is forbidden)

ضْطُرَّ: was forced (into eating what is forbidden)

6:145:32.m: other than (being acted upon by اضْطُرَّ)

6:145:35.m: a transgressor (after لا in this ayah)

6:145:37.m: your Lord (being acted upon by إِنَّ)

6:145:38.m: Most Forgiving (as a general attribute of Allah)

6:145:39.m: Most Merciful (describing Allah as the doer of mercy)

مٌ: (describing Allah as the doer of mercy)

6:146:6.m: possessor of, one who has (describing كُلَّ)

6:146:9.m: the cattle (being described by another word)

6:146:14.m: except (what follows from شُحُومَهُمَآ - their fat)

6:146:24.m: that, that one (masculine) (refers to the punishment mentioned in جَزَيْنٰهُم)

6:147:3.m: then say! (responding to كَذَّبُوكَ - they denied you)

6:147:7.m: spacious, vast (feminine, describing an undefined noun)

6:148:1.m: he will say (subject: those who associated partners with Allah)

6:148:2.m: those who (subject of سَيَقُولُ - will say)

6:148:4.m: if (introducing what the disbelievers will say)

6:148:28.m: and so you all bring it out

6:148:35.m: you all (when speaking to a group)

6:149:7.m: he would surely guide you all

6:150:7.m: Allah (as the object being witnessed about)

6:150:9.m: this (pointing to something in the ayah)

هٰذَا: this (pointing to something in the ayah)

6:150:10.m: then if/and if (connects to previous statement)

6:150:12.m: so not/then not (connects to شَهِدُوا۟ - they testify)

6:150:13.m: you witness (in response to their testimony)

6:150:19.m: they strongly denied/rejected (something as false) (subject of يَعْدِلُونَ)

6:151:1.m: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the people)

قُلْ: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the people)

6:151:10.m: with/by him/it (referring to what Allah has forbidden)

6:151:16.m: your children (referring to multiple people being addressed)

كُم: your (referring to multiple people being addressed)

6:151:18.m: poverty (as reason for مِنْ - from/because of)

6:151:24.m: the very bad things (object of لَا تَقْرَبُوا - do not approach)

6:151:27.m: from it/them (referring to الْفَوَاحِشَ - the shameful deeds)

6:151:28.m: and what (appears in ٱلْفَوٰحِشَ مَا ظَهَرَ)

6:151:29.m: it became hidden (describing ما which refers to الْفَوٰحِشَ - shameful deeds)

6:151:31.m: you (all) end life violently (connected to لَا meaning 'do not')

6:151:35.m: Allah (as the subject of حَرَّمَ - He forbade)

6:152:2.m: you all come near (negative command: 'do not come near' after وَلَا)

6:152:8.m: better/best (describing the way of dealing with orphan's property)

حْسَنُ: (describing the way of dealing with orphan's property)

6:152:27.m: close relative (in relation to ذَا meaning 'one who has/possesses')

6:152:29.m: of Allah (connected to وَبِعَهْدِ - and by the covenant)

6:152:31.m: that is for you all (referring to what was commanded before)

6:153:5.m: so follow him! (command to many people)

6:153:8.m: the paths (that divert from صِرٰطِى/My path)

6:153:16.m: so that you all (shows hope for تَتَّقُونَ)

6:154:3.m: Moses (the one who was given the Book)

6:154:4.m: the Book (what was given to Moses)

6:154:8.m: he did excellently/in the best way

6:154:9.m: and a detailed explanation (object of آتَيْنَا)

6:154:17.m: they believe (referring to those who meet their Lord mentioned earlier in the ayah)

6:155:1.m: and this (points to كِتٰبٌ - the Book)

6:155:3.m: we sent it down (referring to كِتٰبٌ/the book)

6:155:5.m: so follow him/it! (command to many people)

6:155:7.m: so that you all (might receive mercy)

6:157:1.m: or (connecting تَقُولُوا۟ with what came before)

6:157:18.m: so who/then whoever (asking about the subject of أَظْلَمُ - more wrong)

6:157:21.m: he strongly denied/rejected (بِـَٔايٰتِ ٱللَّهِ - the signs of Allah)

6:157:26.m: we will give what is deserved

6:157:29.m: away from (connected to يَصْدِفُونَ - they turn away)

6:157:35.m: they turn away (from آيَاتِنَا - Our signs)

6:158:2.m: they look/watch (referring to the disbelievers waiting for signs)

6:158:15.m: on the day (when يَأْتِى some signs come)

6:158:18.m: signs or miracles (possessed by رَبِّكَ - your Lord)

6:158:22.m: a soul (being acted upon by يَنفَعُ - benefits)

6:158:28.m: before (referring to previous time in this ayah)

قَبْلُ: before (referring to previous time in this ayah)

6:158:30.m: she earned (referring to نَفْسًا - a soul)

6:158:34.m: say! (as a command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

6:159:4.m: their religion (object of فَرَّقُوا - they divided)

6:159:9.m: in (connects شَىْءٍ to what came before)

6:159:15.m: then/thereafter (connecting to يُنَبِّئُهُم - He will inform them)

ثُمَّ: then/thereafter (connecting to يُنَبِّئُهُم - He will inform them)

6:159:18.m: they were (part of فَرَّقُوا۟ - they divided)

6:159:19.m: they do/act (referring to the group who divided their religion)

6:160:3.m: with the good deed (object of جَاءَ)

6:160:5.m: ten (subject of فَلَهُۥ - meaning 'then for him is')

ُ: (subject of فَلَهُۥ - meaning 'then for him is')

6:160:11.m: he is given what is due

6:160:13.m: equal to it (referring to السَّيِّئَةِ - the bad deed)

هَا: it (referring to السَّيِّئَةِ - the bad deed)

6:160:16.m: they are being wronged (referring to those who do good deeds)

6:161:6.m: a path (that leads to مُّسْتَقِيمٍ - straight)

6:161:10.m: way of life or religion (object of إِلَىٰ)

6:161:12.m: one who turns away (from falsehood) [describing دِينًا]

6:161:16.m: the polytheists (those who associate partners with God)

6:162:3.m: my prayer (belonging to me, dedicated to Allah)

6:162:4.m: and my ritual acts of worship

6:162:5.m: and my life (connected to لِلَّهِ - belongs to Allah)

6:162:7.m: for/to Allah (belongs what was mentioned before)

6:163:4.m: and with that (what I was commanded to do)

ذٰلِكَ: that (what I was commanded to do)

6:163:7.m: the foremost one (of الْمُسْلِمِينَ - the Muslims)

6:164:2.m: is it other than? (object of أَبْغِى/I seek)

6:164:5.m: a lord/master (object of أَبْغِى - I seek)

6:164:8.m: of all/of every/of each (describing شَىْءٍ - thing)

6:164:18.m: a female who bears/carries a burden (subject of تَزِرُ)

6:164:23.m: your Lord (referring to all of you being addressed)

كُم: your (referring to all of you being addressed)

6:164:25.m: and then he tells you all important news (about what you disagreed about)

6:164:28.m: in it (referring to what is being differed about)

هِ: it (referring to what is being differed about)

6:165:7.m: some of you (object of فَوْقَ - above)

6:165:11.m: so that he tests you all

6:165:12.m: in/within (shows location in relation to ما/what)

6:165:13.m: what/that which (referring to what Allah gave you)
